title: clerodendrum andamanense
intro: Clerodendrum andamanense, also known as the Andaman glory bower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Clerodendrum andamanense include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various infections, as well as having potential benefits for cardiovascular and respiratory health. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties and benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its full range of uses.
